Peter B. Baumhart,(213) 229-9515 for Defendant Citibank, N.A.
Ingrid Evans, (415) 441-8669 for Plaintiffs Jane and John Doe.
Reporter: Mark Brickman, CSR# 5527,(650) 346-8498, Email: markbrickmancsr5527@yahoo.com.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer To Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action in good faith. Plaintiff shall also allege facts in good faith to support standing. Authorities cited by Defendant are well-taken and should be considered by Plaintiff for the amendment. MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTs CITIBANK , N.A., CITIMORTGAGE INC, QUYEN QUACH's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Debra Bogo-Ernst to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendants is granted. The application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40. Plaintiffs' opposition to the application lacks merit.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
